ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the athlete */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "training_center" TEXT /* Primary training center of the athlete */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialized events of the athlete */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the athlete's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., 100m Sprint) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., Sprint, Middle Distance) */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the event in meters */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the event (e.g., Sprint, Jump, Throw) */,
  "world_record" REAL /* Current world record time for the event */,
  "event_rules" TEXT /* Rules governing the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the competition is part of */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the competition was held */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the competition */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the competition */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Organizer of the competition */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the competition is held */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the competition */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competitions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "medal" TEXT /* Medal awarded (e.g., GOLD, SILVER, BRONZE) */,
  "time" REAL /* Time taken by the athlete in the event */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the athlete in the competition */,
  "reaction_time" REAL /* Reaction time of the athlete at the start */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during the event */,
  "personal_best" INTEGER /* Indicates if the result was a personal best */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the result */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "record_holder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete holding the record */,
  "record_time" REAL /* Record time in seconds */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date the record was set */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the record was set */,
  "record_type" TEXT /* Type of record (e.g., World, National) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_records_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_records_record_holder_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_holder_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)
